definition.title: Gap in Step Numbers
definition.description: This playbook has a gap in its step numbering sequence.

steps.title: Introduction
steps.content: Introduce the topic and set the context for analysis.

steps.title: Analysis
steps.content: Analyze the key factors — but step 2 is missing entirely.

steps.title: Conclusion
steps.content: Summarize findings. Steps 2 and 4 were skipped in numbering.
